problem: What causes normal proteins to misfold into prions and spread through tissue?
hypothesis: Telomerase activation/inhibition in target cells may resolve What causes normal proteins to misfold into prions and spread through tissue? by blocking at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: In vitro cell culture assay with 12 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
